description: Search, retrieve, match, and trace biomedical literature through official NCBI APIs. NCBI disclaimer and copyright information: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/home/about/policies/

auth.label: NCBI API Key
auth.description: Optional NCBI API key passed as the api_key query parameter. Create one from your NCBI account settings to raise the default E-utilities rate limit from 3 to 10 requests per second.

actions.name: convert_article_ids
actions.description: Convert PMID, PMCID, DOI, or author manuscript identifiers with the PMC ID Converter. Complete mappings are available only for articles represented in PubMed Central.

items.description: One PMID, PMCID, DOI, or author manuscript identifier.

ids.description: The article identifiers to convert. Every identifier must have the same idType.

idType.description: The type shared by every input article identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for converting article identifiers.

requestedId.description: The original identifier from the request.

anyOf.description: The PubMed identifier when the article has one.
The PubMed Central identifier when the article is represented in PMC.
The DOI when PMC reports one.
The author manuscript identifier when PMC reports one.
The PMC ID Converter error when the requested identifier could not be resolved.

items.description: The available identifiers for one requested article.

records.description: One conversion result for each identifier returned by PMC.

outputSchema.description: The available identifier mappings returned by PMC.

actions.name: find_related_articles
actions.description: Find normalized PubMed articles related to one source PMID.

limit.description: The maximum number of articles to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for finding related PubMed articles.

anyOf.description: The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

outputSchema.description: The related PubMed articles returned for one source record.

actions.name: get_article
actions.description: Get one normalized PubMed article by PMID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting one PubMed article.

found.description: Whether PubMed returned the requested record.

anyOf.description: The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

outputSchema.description: The result of retrieving one PubMed article.

actions.name: get_article_references
actions.description: Get normalized PubMed references for one source PMID. References are available only when supplied by publishers or recoverable from PMC data.

limit.description: The maximum number of articles to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting references from a source PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

articles.description: The normalized PubMed articles referenced by the source record.

outputSchema.description: The PubMed references returned for one source record.

actions.name: get_articles
actions.description: Get multiple normalized PubMed articles by PMID in one request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting multiple PubMed articles.

anyOf.description: The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

articles.description: The PubMed records that were found.

notFoundPmids.description: The requested PMIDs that PubMed did not return.

outputSchema.description: The result of retrieving multiple PubMed articles.

actions.name: get_citing_articles
actions.description: Get normalized PubMed articles known to cite one source PMID. PubMed citation coverage depends on data supplied by publishers and NCBI sources and may be incomplete.

limit.description: The maximum number of articles to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting articles that cite a source PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

articles.description: The normalized articles known to cite the source record.

outputSchema.description: The citing PubMed articles returned for one source record.

actions.name: match_citation
actions.description: Match one raw biomedical citation to PubMed and return normalized candidate articles.

citation.description: The citation text to match, such as an article title followed by its journal, year, volume, and pages.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for matching one citation.

matched.description: Whether PubMed returned at least one candidate article.

anyOf.description: The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

articles.description: The normalized candidate articles returned by PubMed.

outputSchema.description: The PubMed articles matched from the citation text.

actions.name: search_articles
actions.description: Search PubMed with the official query syntax and return normalized article records.

query.description: The PubMed query, including optional official field tags and Boolean operators such as cancer[Title] AND 2025[pdat].

limit.description: The maximum number of articles to return.

from.description: The earliest publication date to include.

to.description: The latest publication date to include.

publicationDateRange.description: An inclusive PubMed publication date range.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching PubMed articles.

total.description: The total number of matching PubMed records.

anyOf.description: The query translation reported by PubMed.
The structured abstract section label when present.

items.description: One section of a PubMed abstract.

abstract.description: The structured or unstructured abstract sections.

name.description: The author or collective author name.

items.description: A normalized PubMed author or author group.

anyOf.description: The journal ISSN returned by PubMed.

journal.description: The journal information attached to a PubMed record.

anyOf.description: The publication date or source Medline date.

keywords.description: The keywords attached to the PubMed record.

languages.description: The article language codes returned by PubMed.

anyOf.description: The PubMed Central identifier when present.
The PubMed Central article URL when available.

articles.description: The normalized articles in this page.

outputSchema.description: A page of normalized PubMed search results.
